<!--
PR title MUST follow Conventional Commits, e.g.:
  feat(blog): add reading-time estimate
  fix: correct canonical URL on the 404 page
Allowed types: feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, perf, test, build, ci, chore, revert.
Keep the sections below — CI rejects PRs whose description is left as the empty template.
-->

## Description

<!-- Replace this comment with what the PR changes and why. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Tick the one that matches the PR title's Conventional Commits type. -->

- [ ] feat — a new feature
- [ ] fix — a bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation or content
- [ ] refactor / perf / style — no behaviour change
- [ ] ci / build / chore / test — tooling and infrastructure

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123", or "none". -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm type:check`, `pnpm lint:check`, `pnpm lint:css`, `pnpm format:check` and `pnpm test` pass locally
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits
- [ ] No AI attribution in commit messages or this description
- [ ] Existing post URLs are preserved (SEO)
